title: linaria humilis
intro: Linaria humilis, also known as the self-heal or common self-heal, is a perennial herb belonging to the plantain family (Plantaginaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, making it a valuable remedy for various health issues. The linaria humilis plant is believed to have several health benefits, including wound healing, reducing inflammation, and exhibiting antimicrobial activity against certain bacteria and viruses. Linaria humilis is commonly prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or salve, allowing for a range of applications in natural healing practices.
